testcase.name: test_hot_celebs_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Hot celebs should return a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'hot_celebs': [{'article_count': 4, 'base_price': 15.0, 'category': 'public_figure', 'hot_reason': 'Bill Gates Admits to Affairs With Russian Women Amid Epstein Ties, WSJ Reports...', ...}, {'article_count': 3, 'base_price': 4.0, 'category': 'reality_tv', 'hot_reason': 'Mystery as Katie Price gets more tweakments in Dubai despite vowing to fly to UK...', ...}, {'article_count': 3, 'base_price': 13.0, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'After Taylor Swift Posted A Rare Makeup-Free Video, Here Are More Celebrities Wh...', ...}, {'article_count': 2, 'base_price': 11.0, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'Ticketmaster cancels Harry Styles £20 gig tickets after massive demand – are you...', ...}, {'article_count': 4, 'base_price': 11.0, 'category': 'movie_stars', 'hot_reason': 'Hilary Duff admits she CRASHED A-lister ‘nemesis’ movie premiere during years-lo...', ...}, {'article_count': 3, 'base_price': 13.0, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'Danniella Westbrook shows off ‘new face’ in filtered pics after surgery but she’...', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_24_features.py:59: in test_hot_celebs_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list), "Hot celebs should return a list" E AssertionError: Hot celebs should return a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'hot_celebs': [{'article_count': 4, 'base_price': 15.0, 'category': 'public_figure', 'hot_reason': 'Bill Gates Admits to Affairs With Russian Women Amid Epstein Ties, WSJ Reports...', ...}, {'article_count': 3, 'base_price': 4.0, 'category': 'reality_tv', 'hot_reason': 'Mystery as Katie Price gets more tweakments in Dubai despite vowing to fly to UK...', ...}, {'article_count': 3, 'base_price': 13.0, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'After Taylor Swift Posted A Rare Makeup-Free Video, Here Are More Celebrities Wh...', ...}, {'article_count': 2, 'base_price': 11.0, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'Ticketmaster cancels Harry Styles £20 gig tickets after massive demand – are you...', ...}, {'article_count': 4, 'base_price': 11.0, 'category': 'movie_stars', 'hot_reason': 'Hilary Duff admits she CRASHED A-lister ‘nemesis’ movie premiere during years-lo...', ...}, {'article_count': 3, 'base_price': 13.0, 'category': 'musicians', 'hot_reason': 'Danniella Westbrook shows off ‘new face’ in filtered pics after surgery but she’...', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_royals_category_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Category endpoint should return a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'celebrities': [{'age': 42, 'bio': 'Catherine, Princess of Wales is a member of a royal family and public figure.', 'category': 'royals', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e9/Princess_of_Wales_at_State_Banquet_2025-09-17_%280.75_crop%29.jpg/330px-Princess_of_Wales_at_State_Banquet_2025-09-17_%280.75_crop%29.jpg', ...}, {'age': 0, 'bio': 'Sophie, Duchess of Edinburgh, is a member of the British royal family. She is married to Prince Edward, Duke of Edinburgh, the youngest sibling of King Charles III.', 'birth_year': 0, 'buzz_score': 50, ...}, {'age': 0, 'bio': 'Anne, Princess Royal is a member of the British royal family. She is the second child and only daughter of Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh, and the only sister of King Charles III. Born third in the line of succession to the British throne, she is 18th as of 2026. She has held the title of Princess Royal since 1987.', 'birth_year': 0, 'buzz_score': 50, ...}, {'age': 47, 'bio': 'Peter Phillips is a member of a royal family and public figure.', 'category': 'royals', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0b/Procession_to_Lying-in-State_of_Elizabeth_II_at_Westminster_Hall_-_85_-_Peter_Phillips_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Procession_to_Lying-in-State_of_Elizabeth_II_at_Westminster_Hall_-_85_-_Peter_Phillips_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'age': 0, 'bio': 'Prince Edward, Duke of Edinburgh, is a member of the British royal family. He is the youngest child of Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh, and the youngest sibling of King Charles III. Edward was born third in the line of succession to the British throne and is 15th as of 2026.', 'birth_year': 0, 'buzz_score': 50, ...}, {'age': 11, 'bio': 'Prince George of Wales is a member of a royal family and public figure.', 'category': 'royals', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/cb/Trooping_the_Colour_2023_%28GovPM_41%29_crop_2.jpg/330px-Trooping_the_Colour_2023_%28GovPM_41%29_crop_2.jpg', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_24_features.py:88: in test_royals_category_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list), "Category endpoint should return a list" E AssertionError: Category endpoint should return a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'celebrities': [{'age': 42, 'bio': 'Catherine, Princess of Wales is a member of a royal family and public figure.', 'category': 'royals', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e9/Princess_of_Wales_at_State_Banquet_2025-09-17_%280.75_crop%29.jpg/330px-Princess_of_Wales_at_State_Banquet_2025-09-17_%280.75_crop%29.jpg', ...}, {'age': 0, 'bio': 'Sophie, Duchess of Edinburgh, is a member of the British royal family. She is married to Prince Edward, Duke of Edinburgh, the youngest sibling of King Charles III.', 'birth_year': 0, 'buzz_score': 50, ...}, {'age': 0, 'bio': 'Anne, Princess Royal is a member of the British royal family. She is the second child and only daughter of Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh, and the only sister of King Charles III. Born third in the line of succession to the British throne, she is 18th as of 2026. She has held the title of Princess Royal since 1987.', 'birth_year': 0, 'buzz_score': 50, ...}, {'age': 47, 'bio': 'Peter Phillips is a member of a royal family and public figure.', 'category': 'royals', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0b/Procession_to_Lying-in-State_of_Elizabeth_II_at_Westminster_Hall_-_85_-_Peter_Phillips_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Procession_to_Lying-in-State_of_Elizabeth_II_at_Westminster_Hall_-_85_-_Peter_Phillips_%28cropped%29.jpg', ...}, {'age': 0, 'bio': 'Prince Edward, Duke of Edinburgh, is a member of the British royal family. He is the youngest child of Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh, and the youngest sibling of King Charles III. Edward was born third in the line of succession to the British throne and is 15th as of 2026.', 'birth_year': 0, 'buzz_score': 50, ...}, {'age': 11, 'bio': 'Prince George of Wales is a member of a royal family and public figure.', 'category': 'royals', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/cb/Trooping_the_Colour_2023_%28GovPM_41%29_crop_2.jpg/330px-Trooping_the_Colour_2023_%28GovPM_41%29_crop_2.jpg', ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_royals_multiple_requests
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_24_features.py:109: in test_royals_multiple_requests all_royals.add(celeb.get("name", "").lower()) ^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_tv_personalities_category

failure.message: AssertionError: Category endpoint should return a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'celebrities': [{'bio': 'Jonathan Ross is a prominent public figure and media personality.', 'category': 'tv_personalities', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4a/Jonathan_Ross_by_Gage_Skidmore_2.jpg/330px-Jonathan_Ross_by_Gage_Skidmore_2.jpg', 'is_deceased': False, ...}, {'bio': 'Ellen DeGeneres is a well-known television presenter and media personality.', 'category': 'tv_personalities', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/62/Ellen_DeGeneres-2009-enh5.jpg/330px-Ellen_DeGeneres-2009-enh5.jpg', 'is_deceased': False, ...}, {'bio': 'RuPaul is a well-known television presenter and media personality.', 'category': 'tv_personalities', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/3d/2019_California_Hall_of_Fame_Ceremony_01_%28cropped2%29.jpg/330px-2019_California_Hall_of_Fame_Ceremony_01_%28cropped2%29.jpg', 'is_deceased': False, ...}, {'bio': 'Wolfgang Puck is a well-known television presenter and media personality.', 'category': 'tv_personalities', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/16/Wolfgang_Puck_2012.jpg/330px-Wolfgang_Puck_2012.jpg', 'is_deceased': False, ...}, {'bio': 'Seth Meyers is a well-known television presenter and media personality.', 'category': 'tv_personalities', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/00/Seth_Meyers_by_Gage_Skidmore.jpg/330px-Seth_Meyers_by_Gage_Skidmore.jpg', 'is_deceased': False, ...}, {'bio': 'Jamie Oliver is a well-known television presenter and media personality.', 'category': 'tv_personalities', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/38/Jamie_Oliver_%28cropped%29.jpg/330px-Jamie_Oliver_%28cropped%29.jpg', 'is_deceased': False, ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_24_features.py:139: in test_tv_personalities_category assert isinstance(data, list), "Category endpoint should return a list" E AssertionError: Category endpoint should return a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'celebrities': [{'bio': 'Jonathan Ross is a prominent public figure and media personality.', 'category': 'tv_personalities', 'image': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4a/Jonathan_Ross_by_Gage_Skidmore_2.jpg/330px-Jonathan_Ross_by_Gage_Skidmore_2.jpg', 'is_deceased': False, ...}, {'bio': 'Ellen DeGeneres is a well-known television presenter and media personality.', 'category': 'tv_personalities', 'image':
